items.title: Luma launches AI-powered production studio with faith-focused Wonder Project
items.summary: The studio's first project will be about Moses and star Academy Award-winner Ben Kingsley, to be released this spring on Prime Video.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: OpenAI starts offering a biology-tuned LLM
items.summary: GPT-Rosalind is an LLM trained on biology workflows, available in closed access.
